summary:
Tilted, drifted, and rotated teeth may each individually benefit from delayed separation based on varying degrees of impact; however, without more specifics indicating immediate risk, this option broadly covers scenarios needing careful monitoring post-pregnancy. The primary concern is managing patient well-being through appropriate timing of interventions while ensuring safety throughout gestation. \boxed{\text{Tilted, Drifted, Rotated Teeth}} Agent2's summary:

Tilted, drifted, and rotated teeth may need delayed separation as each can affect oral health differently; thus, broad consideration applies across cases pending detailed assessment. Ensuring safe management ensures optimal outcomes both pre- and post-partum. 
\[ \boxed{\text{Tilted, Drifted, Rotated Teeth}} \]
